calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carl Durham, Jr. for petitioner Norma Scerri (via CourtCall).

The Court had concern regarding a payment of attorneys fees from the escrow. Mr. Durham responded that the fee payment did not go to the estate counsel. He said that the property had been in foreclosure, and thought that the lender may have incurred legal fees connected with the foreclosure process which were paid in the closing of the escrow. The Court granted the petition re accounting and final distribution, subject to review of the order.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-24-2018 Continued To Feb-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Continued To Jan-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carl Durham for Norma Scerri.

Mr. Durham stated that he just got the inventory from the Referee on Friday, that he filed it this morning and that he will file a declaration regarding fees. Mr. Durham also acknowledged that receipts for distribution are needed from each individual beneficiary and stated that mailing to the Franchise Tax Board was done on November 15th. The Amended Petition for Final Distribution is continued to January 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-29-2017 Continued To Dec-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Nov-29-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carl Durham for and with Norma Scerri.

Mr. Durham stated that sanctions have been paid, that they brought the accounting current, that it has been filed and that the inventory was filed. Mr Durham also stated that waivers of account were not filed, that they are missing some signatures, that receipts on distribution and the escrow statement are filed (attached to the report of sale), and that notice to the Franchise Tax Board is going out today. The Amended Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account is continued to November 29, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Both parties are to be present.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Continued To Nov-13-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carl Durham, Jr. for (petitioner) Norma Scerri.

Mr. Durham reported that his client was confused and thought the hearing was next Monday and that they would like to continue to that date. The Court stated that it is sanctioning Ms. Scerri $400.00 and that at the last date counsel stated that he would have the information. Mr. Durham stated that it was filed on Friday. The Court stated that it is ordering Ms. Sclerri to appear and will sanction her again if she does not. The Accounting Petition was continued to November 13, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-18-2017 Continued To Oct-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carl Durham for Petitioner.

Mr. Durham stated that he filed an amended petition last month and that he got no feed back. The Court reminded Mr. Durham that his Client (Norma Scerri) was ordered/required to appear and stated that if she does not appear at the next hearing, she will be sanctioned in the amount of $400.00. Mr. Durham stated that he just received the closing documents from the title company on Monday, that he needs to redact it, that he has waivers, receipts on distribution and cancelled checks, and that he can have the documents filed in one week. The Amended Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account is continued to October 30, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Durham assured the Court that Ms. Scerri will be present.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Continued To Oct-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carl Durham, Jr. for Norma Scerri.

Mr. Durham stated that he filed the petition on Monday, that his Client was unable to attend due to a medical issue with her Husband and that she will be available in three weeks. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account is continued to October 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Durham's Client is required to be present.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-23-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2017 Continued To Sep-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carl Durham, Jr. for Petitioner.

Mr. Durham explained that in 2007 Mr. and Ms. Ramirez had a Trust, that they put all of the property in the Trust, that when Mr. Ramirez passed away Ms. Ramirez took out a reverse mortgage and accidently put the property in her name, and that she never put it back in the Trust. Mr. Durham also stated that when Ms. Ramirez passed away, the lender wanted to foreclose on the property, that they got an offer on the house, that they got an order on August 6, 2014 which authorized Ms. Scerri to proceed with the sale, and that letters were issued and presented to the title company. The Court informed Counsel that letters were never filed, that he has to file letters, and that he has to file an amendment to the petition showing where the money from the sale went, receipts from the beneficiaries and a copy of the closing escrow statement. Mr. Durham stated that Ms. Scerri paid him $3,000.00 out her pocket, that Ms. Scerri disappeared, that the matter fell off his calendar, that he can have it done in two weeks and that he is going to be meeting with Ms. Scerri. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account is continued to September 20, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Scerri is ordered to be present at the hearing.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Continued To Aug-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vivial Lerche specially appearing for petitioner Norma Scherri.

Ms. Lerlche reported that the only asset of the estate was real property which has been sold, and the proceeds distributed. The Court stated that this was a problem, as the administrator had failed to file an inventory and appraisal and had failed to obtain court approval for the sale or the distribution, all of which were improper. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the administrator to appear on August 23, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed, and why the property was sold and proceeds distributed without court approval. The hearing on the petition to approve accounting is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
